name: Spencer Moxley
title: High School Senior · Builder, Homelabber & Debater
education: High School Class of 2026 · Your High School
bio: High school senior who likes figuring out how things work — racking servers, writing code, arguing both sides of a resolution, and reading philosophy when the screens are off.
aboutLong: I'm a high school senior with a habit of taking things apart to understand them. Most of my free time goes to my homelab — running services, breaking my own network, and learning infrastructure the hard way — and to writing code for projects that scratch a real itch. Outside of tech, competitive debate has taught me how to build an argument, weigh evidence, and stay honest under pressure, and philosophy keeps me asking why any of it matters. I'm still early in all of it, which is the point: I'm here to keep learning out loud. (Replace this with your own story whenever you're ready.)
